concept: The Bharat Neo-Ledger. A warm, trustworthy, paper-and-ink inspired UI optimized for mobile web. It bridges the gap between traditional Indian bookkeeping (Bahi-Khata) and modern SaaS, without feeling like a cold, generic western fintech app. It leans into trust, utilizing grounded earth tones, crisp typography, and high-contrast tactile elements.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1E3F33]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1C1B1F]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind Scale). Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Mobile-first grid layouts.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and data. Center hero text only if balanced.

cards.classes: bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-xl border border-[#E7E5E4] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3F33] text-white hover:bg-[#2A5244] font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2CC8F] text-[#1E3F33] hover:bg-[#E3BA79] font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#1E3F33] text-[#1E3F33] hover:bg-[#FDFBF7] font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors

whatsapp_simulator.header: bg-[#075E54] text-white p-4 flex items-center shadow-md
whatsapp_simulator.bubble_received: bg-white text-[#1C1B1F] rounded-tr-xl rounded-b-xl p-3 shadow-sm max-w-[80%]
whatsapp_simulator.bubble_sent: bg-[#DCF8C6] text-[#1C1B1F] rounded-tl-xl rounded-b-xl p-3 shadow-sm max-w-[80%] self-end

surfaces_and_components.tables: Shadcn UI tables, customized with text-[#57534E] and border-[#E7E5E4]. Flat styling without heavy borders. Use p-4 for cells.
surfaces_and_components.glassmorphism: Used only for sticky headers. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E7E5E4]/50

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Buttons darken in hue.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and chat bubbles.

icons_and_assets.style: Stroke width 2px, rounded, colored in #1E3F33 or #78716C.

hero_image.description: A street vendor in Varanasi, representing the target MSME persona. Use with a dark green or terracotta gradient overlay (bg-black/30) to ensure text contrast.

receipt_texture.description: Paper receipt texture, can be used as a subtle background element in the invoice upload section or pricing cards.

market_ambience.description: Indian market shop street view, ideal for the CA/bulk dashboard background or onboarding screens.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text against backgrounds. The #1E3F33 primary color on #FDFBF7 background provides excellent contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT use generic blue/purple SaaS colors. Stick to the Earthy 'Neo-Ledger' palette.
Implement the WhatsApp Chat Simulator using the specific classes provided in surfaces_and_components.whatsapp_simulator.
Ensure Devanagari script renders properly by prioritizing 'IBM Plex Sans' in the global font family.
Do not use transparent headers without a backdrop blur and background tint.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the marketing landing page structure, utilizing the 'bento_grid_marketing' layout.
Use Shadcn UI components heavily for the dashboard and CA panel, but customize their borders, radii, and shadows to match the 'surfaces_and_components.cards' style.
Ensure all data-testids are implemented for every form input, button, and navigation link.
